6.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many compilers no longer support it, leading to a compilation error. It should be replaced with 'fgets'.]

14.reason: Accesses str[i+1] which may be logically out of bounds when i == line-1; logic also fails to correctly handle string segments.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.125 , reason:  该条件过于宽泛，会错误地复制非扩展字符以及后一个扩展的起始字符（导致重复），且未考虑无效减号应原样输出
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Accesses str[i+1] which may be logically out of bounds when i == line-1; logic also fails to correctly handle string segments.

26.reason: Missing boundary check for i. Accessing str[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds access; should ensure i > 0 && i < line - 1 before expansion.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing boundary check for i. Accessing str[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds access; should ensure i > 0 && i < line - 1 before expansion.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Missing bounds check for i>0 and i<line-1, causing out-of-bounds access when '-' is at the start or end of the string.

28.reason: Only handles valid expansion cases; fails to output the unchanged string when types mismatch or right <= left, violating problem requirements.
